MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHILOTTI, LINDA L COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-27-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHILOTTI, LINDA L SERVED OCT-02-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MARCUS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELAURIA, MANUEL ELAURIA, BEATRICE SELBY, MARCUS PLTF. LINDA GHILOTTI TO HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 665 BANK STREET S.F. CA. FROM MANUEL AND BEATRICE ELAURIA AND MARCUS SELBY. PAST DUE RENT OWED IS $6,364.00 HOWEVER DEFTS. MANUEL AND BEATRICE TO PAY $4,300.00 IN INSTALLMENTS OF $150.00 PER WEEK BEGINNING 10/29/93 AND EACH SECOND WEEK THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF MANUEL OR BEATRICE DEFAULT ON ANY INSTALLMENT, THE FULL $6,364.00 IS DUE. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 11/15/93. IF DEFAULT ON ANY PAYMENT BY BEATRICE AND MANUEL, THEN INTEREST FROM THE DATE OF JUDGMENT AND THEREAFTER. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHILOTTI, LINDA L AS TO DEFENDANT ELAURIA, MANUEL ELAURIA, BEATRICE SELBY, MARCUS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELAURIA, MANUEL ELAURIA, BEATRICE SELBY, MARCUS PLTF. LINDA GHILOTTI TO HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 665 BANK STREET S.F. CA. FROM MANUEL AND BEATRICE ELAURIA AND MARCUS SELBY. PAST DUE RENT OWED IS $6,364.00 HOWEVER DEFTS. MANUEL AND BEATRICE TO PAY $4,300.00 IN INSTALLMENTS OF $150.00 PER WEEK BEGINNING 10/29/93 AND EACH SECOND WEEK THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF MANUEL OR BEATRICE DEFAULT ON ANY INSTALLMENT, THE FULL $6,364.00 IS DUE. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 11/15/93. IF DEFAULT ON ANY PAYMENT BY BEATRICE AND MANUEL, THEN INTEREST FROM THE DATE OF JUDGMENT AND THEREAFTER. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
